# Vendor Portal API v1

Base route:

`/api/v1/vendor`

Authentication:

- Endpoints are protected by `auth:sanctum`.
- Portal access is restricted to users in `vendor` group.

- `docs/frontend/api/v1/vendor/procurement.md`
